center.name: 西西伯利亚
center.summary: 西西伯利亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括烏鵰，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: 3): 103-106. A wintering greater spotted eagle in southwest Saudi Arabia (from a Western Siberia breeding area) was found to utilize an average home range in winter of , which contracted 24% before it migrated in the spring, taking from late February to late April to migrate over .Meyburg, B.-U., Eichacker, X., Meyburg, C
